'''fovathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ataraxic|ataraxic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-v-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ataraxic|ataraxic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fovathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fovathithi|fovathithi]] || [[word:fovathiji|fovathiji]] || [[word:fovathishi|fovathishi]] || [[word:fovathiki|fovathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fovathuthuthu|fovathuthuthu]] || [[word:fovathujuju|fovathujuju]] || [[word:fovathushushu|fovathushushu]] || [[word:fovathukuku|fovathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fovathuthu|fovathuthu]] || [[word:fovathuju|fovathuju]] || [[word:fovathushu|fovathushu]] || [[word:fovathuku|fovathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fovathufthuf|fovathufthuf]] || [[word:fovathufjuf|fovathufjuf]] || [[word:fovathufshuf|fovathufshuf]] || [[word:fovathufkuf|fovathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fovathethe|fovathethe]] || [[word:fovatheje|fovatheje]] || [[word:fovatheshe|fovatheshe]] || [[word:fovatheke|fovatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fovathothotho|fovathothotho]] || [[word:fovathojojo|fovathojojo]] || [[word:fovathoshosho|fovathoshosho]] || [[word:fovathokoko|fovathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fovathotho|fovathotho]] || [[word:fovathojo|fovathojo]] || [[word:fovathosho|fovathosho]] || [[word:fovathoko|fovathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fovathofthof|fovathofthof]] || [[word:fovathofjof|fovathofjof]] || [[word:fovathofshof|fovathofshof]] || [[word:fovathofkof|fovathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fovathĂŻfthĂŻf|fovathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:fovathĂŻfjĂŻf|fovathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:fovathĂŻfshĂŻf|fovathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:fovathĂŻfkĂŻf|fovathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fovathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|fovathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:fovathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|fovathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:fovathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|fovathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:fovathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|fovathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fovathĂŻfthĂŻf|fovathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:fovathĂŻfjĂŻf|fovathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:fovathĂŻfshĂŻf|fovathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:fovathĂŻfkĂŻf|fovathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fovathĂŻfthĂŻf|fovathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:fovathĂŻfjĂŻf|fovathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:fovathĂŻfshĂŻf|fovathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:fovathĂŻfkĂŻf|fovathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fovathĂŠthĂŠ|fovathĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:fovathĂŠjĂŠ|fovathĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:fovathĂŠshĂŠ|fovathĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:fovathĂŠkĂŠ|fovathĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fovathathatha|fovathathatha]] || [[word:fovathajaja|fovathajaja]] || [[word:fovathashasha|fovathashasha]] || [[word:fovathakaka|fovathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fovathatha|fovathatha]] || [[word:fovathaja|fovathaja]] || [[word:fovathasha|fovathasha]] || [[word:fovathaka|fovathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fovathafthaf|fovathafthaf]] || [[word:fovathafjaf|fovathafjaf]] || [[word:fovathafshaf|fovathafshaf]] || [[word:fovathafkaf|fovathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:fovathasha|fovathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:fovathshĂ«asha|fovathshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fovathroasha|fovathroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fovathmuasha|fovathmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:fovathyaasha|fovathyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofovathnkshĂ«asha|gofovathnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofovathnkroasha|gofovathnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofovathnkmuasha|gofovathnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofovathnkyaasha|gofovathnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:fovavathasha|fovavathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fovavathshĂ«asha|fovavathshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fovavathroasha|fovavathroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fovavathmuasha|fovavathmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fovavathyaasha|fovavathyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofovavathnkshĂ«asha|gofovavathnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofovavathnkroasha|gofovavathnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofovavathnkmuasha|gofovavathnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofovavathnkyaasha|gofovavathnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:fevĂŠthasha|fevĂŠthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fevĂŠthshĂ«asha|fevĂŠthshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fevĂŠthroasha|fevĂŠthroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fevĂŠthmuasha|fevĂŠthmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fevĂŠthyaasha|fevĂŠthyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofevĂŠthnkshĂ«asha|gofevĂŠthnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofevĂŠthnkroasha|gofevĂŠthnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofevĂŠthnkmuasha|gofevĂŠthnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofevĂŠthnkyaasha|gofevĂŠthnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:fovfathasha|fovfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fovfathshĂ«asha|fovfathshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fovfathroasha|fovfathroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fovfathmuasha|fovfathmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fovfathyaasha|fovfathyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofovfathnkshĂ«asha|gofovfathnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofovfathnkroasha|gofovfathnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofovfathnkmuasha|gofovfathnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofovfathnkyaasha|gofovfathnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
